title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Code With Aarohi presents a tutorial for building an AI Travel Planning System using LangGraph with four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and response generation. The system integrates Llama 3.3 70B, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs for real-time data while deployed via Streamlit.
